About Me

Building at the intersection of AI and Apple's ecosystem.

I'm Anshil Samar S, a first year student at RD National College of Arts and Science, pursuing a degree in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science. Alongside my coursework, I'm currently learning Swift App Development at SkyNet, working toward becoming a well-rounded iOS developer.

I'm passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, iOS Development and modern technology in general — and I love building innovative, AI-powered applications while continuously sharpening my technical skills.
